VAL-P2P-001.evidence: Microbenchmark (200 iters, hidden=5120 FP16): TP=4 host-mediated=187.3 us/call, P2P GPU=122.2 us/call, speedup=1.53x (>= 1.5x target). TP=2: host=102.0 us, P2P=79.3 us, speedup=1.29x. All correctness checks also PASS (max_abs_err=0.0000e+00 for TP=2, TP=3, TP=4).

VAL-P2P-002.evidence: TP=4 decode (test_tp4_correctness.py) with full Qwen3.5-27B-GPTQ-Int4 model loaded on 4 GPUs. All 10 decode steps passed with cosine similarity >= 0.999977 (threshold=0.99). RESULT: PASS — All 10 steps have cosine sim >= 0.99.

VAL-P2P-003.evidence: 100-step TP=4 decode benchmark (bench_tp4.py) completed successfully with all 4 GPUs. Throughput: 12.4 tok/s, Latency: 80.5 ms/tok. Allreduce overhead: 23.47 ms/tok (29.2% of total). Model weights loaded on all 4 GPUs (Qwen3.5-27B-GPTQ-Int4).

frictions: Model weight loading takes ~92-137 seconds per test run (27B model on 4 GPUs)
TP=4 throughput (12.4 tok/s) is below single-GPU (20.3 tok/s) due to allreduce overhead (29.2% of total time). This is expected as a baseline for milestone 1 - further milestones will optimize.
